name: gse
tagline: Goal-Spec-Evidence Engineering for long-running agentic software projects.
summary: GSE is a workflow skill for AI coding agents. It turns ad hoc development into goal maps, scoped specs, focused execution, evidence gates, release checks, and reusable learning.

hostSupport.notes: Portable command routing is verified; project-level native slash command support remains host-specific.
Command file shape is generated by GSE; real runtime evidence must be recorded separately.

boundaries: This catalog metadata is public discoverability evidence.
Third-party marketplace approval requires a separate accepted listing record.
Host-native slash command support requires real host runtime invocation evidence.
